//: Publish build — emits dist/*.js (+ .d.ts) from src. Extends tsconfig.base.json so the typecheck settings stay the single source of truth; rewriteRelativeImportExtensions turns the explicit ./x.ts import specifiers into ./x.js on emit. Per-package configs add rootDir/outDir/include. Dev still runs .ts directly via the `iris-src` export condition — this only runs at publish.
